title: Ferrari Stunt Driver Challenge
description: A CesiumMan stands beside a parked Ferrari on a runway. The player must complete a multi-step stunt driving sequence: enter the car, start the engine, accelerate through speed gates, perform a drift maneuver, stop at a target zone, and have CesiumMan exit and celebrate with an animation loop.
prompt:
Create a single HTML file using Three.js r170 that implements a Ferrari Stunt Driver Challenge game. Load CesiumMan.glb and ferrari.glb using GLTFLoader from a CDN. Set up a ground plane textured as asphalt (dark gray with subtle grid lines) stretching 500 units. Place the Ferrari at the origin and CesiumMan standing 3 units to the driver-side door. Use a third-person chase camera with smooth lerp following. Add directional light with shadows, ambient light, and a hemisphere light for sky coloring. Create an on-screen HUD showing current step, speed (km/h), and a progress bar. The interaction sequence requires these validated steps: Step 1 - Click CesiumMan to select him (highlight with outline or emissive glow, validate click intersects CesiumMan mesh). Step 2 - Press E to enter the Ferrari (animate CesiumMan walking toward car door using his animation clip, then hide CesiumMan and parent camera to car, validate E key pressed while CesiumMan is selected). Step 3 - Press Space to start engine (play engine sound via Web Audio oscillator, add subtle car vibration shake, validate Space pressed while in car). Step 4 - Use W/A/S/D to drive through 5 colored ring gates placed along the runway (gates are torus geometries spaced 40 units apart, validate car passes through each gate in order by checking bounding box overlap, speed must exceed 20 units/s). Step 5 - Press Shift near gate 4 to trigger a drift (rotate car 45 degrees with tire smoke particles using BufferGeometry points, validate Shift held while speed above 30). Step 6 - Stop inside a glowing green target zone circle after gate 5 (validate speed below 2 and car position within 5 units of target center). Step 7 - Press E to exit (show CesiumMan again beside car, play his walk animation in a victory loop). Display a congratulations modal with total elapsed time on completion. Each step shows instructional text at screen top. OrbitControls should be disabled during driving and enabled during non-driving phases.

[State Exposure (required)]
Expose window.__3D_STATE__ updated every animation frame:
window.__3D_STATE__ = {
  cesiumManSelected: boolean,         // whether CesiumMan is currently selected by player click
  playerInCar: boolean,         // whether CesiumMan has entered the Ferrari
  engineStarted: boolean,         // whether the car engine has been started
  carSpeed: number,         // current speed of the Ferrari in km/h
  gatesPassed: number,         // count of speed gates successfully driven through (0-5)
  driftCompleted: boolean,         // whether the drift maneuver has been successfully performed
  stoppedAtTarget: boolean,         // whether the car has stopped within the target zone
  cesiumManExited: boolean,         // whether CesiumMan has exited the car
  celebrationPlaying: boolean,         // whether CesiumMan celebration animation is looping
  currentStep: number,         // current step index in the challenge sequence (1-9)
  carPositionX: number,         // X coordinate of Ferrari position in world space
  carRotationY: number,         // Y rotation of Ferrari in radians
}
